'''Ahlenn''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Ahlenn system]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a prolonged conflict between [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the Imperial [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Kohrin]]'s [[Admiral Kohrin's second fleet|second fleet]] bombarded the planet thinking that it was home to an [[Unidentified Rebel base (Ahlenn)|active Rebel base]], in retaliation for [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[First attack on the Enforcer|attack]] on the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor-class'' Star Dreadnought]] [[Enforcer (Executor-class)|''Enforcer'']] at the nearby planet of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. The base was in fact empty, abandoned two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] previously.<ref name="SD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ahlenn was introduced in the [[1989]] [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] adventure "[[Starfighters Down]]," written by [[William W. Connors]] and published within the magazine [[Challenge 38|''Challenge'' 38]]. As the adventure was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process,<ref name="SD" /> it is considered non-[[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends continuity]].<ref name="UnlicensedStatus">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref>
